headline: Viasat, Globalstar, Pure Storage, Jabil, and Plexus Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after investor sentiment turned positive on hopes of a potential ceasefire in Iran, which also contributed to easing oil prices.
